/CAL: SENTENCE/MIT/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 51D/CTS:51/DNACOMP/WS/WEAP/CTORD: DEFT TO ABIDE BY PREVIOUSLY SERVED STAY AWAY ORDERS,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/UNABLE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JONATHAN BIGFORD, SFPD/WITSWORN DA:LATASHA ABRAHAM-BATES/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER CHRISTOPHER LEONG, SFPD/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JENNIFER MARINO, SFPD/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1: BLACK AND WHITE PHOTO DEPICTING A KNIFE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 2:COPY OF A SAFEWAY RECEIPT/ARG&SUB/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REDUCE COUNTS TO MISDEMEANOR IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART,/HTA1:1, 2, 3 5 AND 7/871D:4/X: THEMAGISTRATE FINDS THAT THE ALLEGATIONS WITHIN COUNT 1, PENAL CODE SECTION 12022(B)(1) TO BE TRUE,/X: THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THE OFFENSE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 484, A LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE WITHIN COUNT 6 PENAL CODE SECTION 666,SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE, HAVE BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSETO BELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THAT SAID DEFENDANT BE HELDTOANSWER TO THE SAME,/X: THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THE OFFENSE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 484, A LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE WITHIN COUNT 8 PENAL CODE SECTION 666, SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE, HAVE BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THEREIS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THAT SAID DEFENDANT BE HELDTOANSWER TO THE SAME,/BAIL:100,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG AND PD MTN TO CONTINUE/X:DEFENDANT IS 4011,5 TODAY/CTORD:PEOPLE WITNESS LATISHA BATES AND RICHARDO LOPEZ TO RETURN ON 05-02-11 AT 9AM/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING /DOP/
